titleStmt.title: SII 24.501: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 501. (A.R. No. 311 of 1950-51.) PRĀKĀRA, EAST SIDE, TIERS OF THE ARJUNA-MAṆḌAPA, FACING THE EAST WALL OF THE ŚEṈAIMUDALIYĀR SHRINE.

summary.p: Damaged. Seems to register a grant of money income from the village Tāmanallūr in Peṇṇaikkarai-nāḍu by Śrīraṅgāchārya of the Vādhūla-gōtra, Āpastamba-sūtra and Yajuś-śākhā for offerings on the 5th day of the Tirumoḻittirunāḷ in the Chitra-maṇḍapa. The details of the date viz. Śaka 1502, Vikrama, Kumbha śu. 12, Wednesday correspond to 1581 A.D., February 15, ·35. The nakshatra was Pushya and it lasted till ·63 of the day.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrīman mahāmaṇḍaleśvaran rājādhirāja rājaparameśvaran śrīvirapratāpa śrīvira śrīraṅgadevamahārāyar prithuvirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakāpdam 1000 5 100 2 Itaṉmel cellāniṉṟa vikrama samvatsarattu kumbhanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu dvādaśiyum budhavāramum peṟṟa kṣatrattu nāḷ ṇṭiyakulāśanivaḷanāṭṭu viḻāvaṟāviti vaḷanāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkan tiruppati perumāḷ śrīraṅga
nāthadevar śrībhaṇṭārattukku vādhūlagotrattu Āpastambasūtrattu yajuśśākhāddhyāyiyāna vanā r śrīraṅgācāryaneṉ daṇḍan samarppittu poliyūṭṭu ccilāśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevaṟku tirumoḻit tirunāḷ Añcāntirunāḷaikku cittira maṇṭapattil k kaṭṭaḷaippo kku tiruviḷaiyāṭṭamākac cetta peṇṇaik karai nāṭu tāmanallūr Ūr 1- kku
kkaṭṭaḷai tirumoḻit tirunāḷ Añcāntirunāḷaikku kku tirumālai cittiramaṇṭapattil Eṟiaruḷukaiyil tirukkuttumaṇiviḷakkukku neyyamutu tiruvantikkāppukku neyyamutu poṉ Iraṇṭumā kku pu2(1/2) tiruvā rātaṉam kaṇṭaruḷukaiyil cātti Aruḷum cantaṉam kastūri kaṟpūram sāmbrāṇi Uḷpaṭa vakai pu 5 viniyokattukkuc cāttiyaruḷum cantaṉam paṭi 3 10kku
Aṭaikkāy Amutu Ilaiyamutu Amutu 4 100 5 poṉ vaṭai 2 100 kku poṉ 2 pu4¥ cukiyan 2 100kku poṉ 2pu7¥ cakkarai poṅkal 100 10 2 campāt taḷikai vellam kaṟiamutu tayiramutu Uḷpaṭa poṉ 2 poritta neyamutu 4 10 poṉ2pu2(1/2) Ākap poliyūṭṭuk kaṭṭaḷaic celavu poṉ 3 10 Intap poṉ muppatu
kkum Inta grāmattil Utaiyam koṇṭe candrādityavarai naṭakka kaṭava tākavum Itukku varum viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu śrīraṅgācāryyare putrapautra paramparaiyāka peṟṟuvarak kaṭavatākavum . dānapāla nayormmaddhye dānāt śreyonupālanam . dānāt svargama vāpnoti pālanādaccutam padam . Ippaṭikku Intap poliyūṭṭu śilāśāsanam Eḻutinamaikku koyil kaṇakku śrīraṅganārāyaṇapriyan Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 24.501 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
